testReport.title: 变色龙 Merkle Tree 更新功能测试报告
testReport.titleEn: Chameleon Merkle Tree Update Feature Test Report
testReport.feature: 文件更新接口 (变色龙哈希模式) / File Update API (Chameleon Hash Mode)

testResults.name: 服务器健康检查
testResults.details: API 服务器运行正常 / API server running normally

testResults.name: 文件上传 (chameleon 模式)
testResults.details: CID 生成成功 / CID generated successfully

testResults.name: 文件更新
testResults.details: CID 保持不变 / CID remained unchanged

testResults.name: CID 一致性验证
testResults.details: 更新前后 CID 一致 / CID consistent before and after update

testResults.name: 参数更新验证
testResults.details: RegularRootHash 和 RandomNum 改变，PublicKey 保持不变

testResults.name: 多次更新测试
testResults.details: 第二次更新后 CID 仍保持不变 / CID remained unchanged after second update

testResults.name: 错误处理测试
testResults.details: 正确返回错误状态码 / Correct error status codes returned

modifiedFiles.change: 添加 RegularRootHash 字段 / Added RegularRootHash field

实现更新接口 / Implemented update endpoint
注册更新路由 / Registered update route

chameleonHashVerification.description: 变色龙哈希原理验证 / Chameleon hash principle verification
chameleonHashVerification.coreProperty: 在拥有私钥的情况下，可以找到不同的随机数使得哈希值保持不变 / With the private key, different random numbers can be found to keep the hash value unchanged

upload.regularRootHash: 原始内容哈希 / Original content hash

firstUpdate.regularRootHash: 修改内容哈希 / Modified content hash

secondUpdate.regularRootHash: 再次修改内容哈希 / Re-modified content hash

verification: CID 在更新过程中保持不变，证明变色龙哈希碰撞成功 / CID remained unchanged during updates, proving successful chameleon hash collision
RandomNum 在每次更新时都改变，说明每次都计算了新的碰撞 / RandomNum changed in each update, indicating new collision calculated each time
PublicKey 保持不变，符合设计预期 / PublicKey remained unchanged, meeting design expectations

conclusions.statement: 变色龙 Merkle Tree 更新功能已成功实现，所有测试用例均通过
conclusions.statementEn: The Chameleon Merkle Tree update feature has been successfully implemented, all test cases passed

conclusions.statement: 验证了在文件更新时，CID 能够保持不变，这是变色龙哈希的核心特性
conclusions.statementEn: Verified that CID remains unchanged during file updates, which is the core property of chameleon hash

conclusions.statement: RegularRootHash 和 RandomNum 正确更新，PublicKey 保持不变，符合设计预期
conclusions.statementEn: RegularRootHash and RandomNum updated correctly, PublicKey remained unchanged, meeting design expectations

conclusions.statement: 错误场景能够正确处理并返回适当的 HTTP 状态码
conclusions.statementEn: Error scenarios handled correctly with appropriate HTTP status codes

recommendations.recommendation: 在生产环境中，私钥应通过安全的方式配置（如环境变量或密钥管理系统），不应直接硬编码在配置文件中
recommendations.recommendationEn: In production, private keys should be configured securely (e.g., environment variables or key management systems), not hardcoded in config files

recommendations.recommendation: 对于大文件更新，可以考虑流式处理以减少内存占用
recommendations.recommendationEn: For large file updates, consider streaming to reduce memory footprint

recommendations.recommendation: 增强日志记录以跟踪文件更新操作和审计目的
recommendations.recommendationEn: Enhance logging for tracking file update operations and audit purposes

recommendations.recommendation: 考虑添加权限验证，确保只有拥有私钥的用户才能更新文件
recommendations.recommendationEn: Consider adding permission checks to ensure only users with the private key can update files

recommendations.recommendation: 考虑添加文件版本历史记录功能，以便追踪文件的修改历史
recommendations.recommendationEn: Consider adding file version history feature to track file modification history
